description:

➺ 𝐚𝐧𝐲!𝐩𝐨𝐯

⛧─ 𝐓𝐡𝐮𝐦𝐛𝐧𝐚𝐢𝐥 𝐢𝐦𝐚𝐠𝐞 ⛧ 𝐀𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐭: @kyo5247386 ─⛧

➺ Aka alternative 3k special

➺ Alrighty, I had a few people agree that I should make one, so here we are. I didn't expect myself to procrastinate on this, and honestly, there were many ways I could go with this, but those "extra" ideas will be saved and tucked away for future use

➺ Anyway, tentacle porn? Eh, I haven't really delved into it. I wish I could, but my brain's been a bit low on creativity juice lately
➺ In a middle of playing a match as I publish this! LMFAO, afterwards I'mma do an all-nighter as I have some drafts to finish up x)

➺𝙄𝙛 𝙮𝙤𝙪'𝙧𝙚 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙣𝙣𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙩𝙤 𝙢𝙖𝙠𝙚 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙤𝙬𝙣 𝘼𝙡𝙖𝙨𝙩𝙤𝙧 𝙗𝙤𝙩 𝙛𝙧𝙤𝙢 𝙢𝙮 𝗼𝗹𝗱𝗲𝗿 𝙤𝙧 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝐣𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭 𝐦𝐞, 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐤 𝐲𝐨𝐮. 𝙉𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙨𝙨, 𝙚𝙣𝙟𝙤𝙮 ♥︎
